items.subject: Economic Management Sciences
items.stem: Which source would best answer a question about the economy in the local area?

options.label: A
options.text: A community interview or local archive record

options.label: B
options.text: A fictional story with no historical details

options.label: C
options.text: A picture with no caption or date

options.label: D
options.text: An unrelated advertisement

items.explanation: Local sources provide relevant evidence. Read the question carefully, rule out answers that do not fit the facts, and choose the option that matches what you worked out.

distractor_rationale.B: This option shows a common error with source analysis.
distractor_rationale.C: This option shows a common error with source analysis.
distractor_rationale.D: This option shows a common error with source analysis.

items.subject: Economic Management Sciences
